limitations: No quantified dollar amounts or headcount figures tied to AI investment were found in the excerpts; investment intensity capped at 3 due to absence of quantified spend
Narrative concreteness scored 4 (deployed platform with operating detail) but no quantified business results (e.g., productivity %, revenue lift) were disclosed, preventing a score of 5
Promotional language present throughout business and MD&A sections; Omni platform claims reflect company assertions, not independently verified outcomes
